name: batch-changes
description: Automate multi-repo changes — apply a sed/patch/script across multiple repositories and open MRs/PRs via Sourcegraph search and GitLab API.

create.description: Create a new batch change spec (saved locally, not yet executed)

--description.description: Human-readable description of the batch change

--query.description: Sourcegraph search query to find target repos (e.g. "repo:myorg/ file:package.json lodash")

--script.description: Shell command to run inside each repo clone (e.g. "sed -i 's/old/new/g' file.txt")

--branch.description: Branch name to create in each repo (default: batch/{name})

run.description: Execute a batch change: clone repos, apply script, commit, push, and open GitLab MRs

name.description: Name of the batch change to execute

--dry-run.description: Show what would happen without making any changes

status.description: Show the status of a batch change (open/merged/closed MRs)

name.description: Name of the batch change to check

health.description: Check connectivity to Sourcegraph and GitLab
